data.content:
This is an MSTest project on .NET 8. You can use `dotnet watch test` for hot reload — it will re-run tests automatically whenever you save a file.

Start it with:

```
dotnet watch test --project TestProject.csproj
```

Want me to launch it now? It will keep running in the background and re-execute tests on every file change. You currently have one failing test (`CalculateShipping_ExpressDelivery_Returns15` expects `15.00` but the code returns `10.00`).
